LAW AND MOTION, 301, LARRY R. SHOCKEY'S MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD FOR PLAINTIFF STEVEN POLLACK IS OFF CALENDAR. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: JOSEPH VICKSTEIN, CSR# 4780

LAW AND MOTION 301, MR. LARRY R. SHOCKEY'S MOTION TO BE RELIEVED AS PLAINTIFF STEVEN POLLACK'S ATTORNEY OF RECORD IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION HAS BEEN FILED. PER REPRESENTATION OF MR. POLLACK IN OPEN COURT, HE AGREED TO HIS COUNSEL WITHDRAWING FROM THE CASE. THE CMC CALENDAR FOR 02/13/09 HAS BEEN CONTINUED TO 03/20/09 IN DEPT. 212. ORDER WAS SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR# 8189

THERE WAS NO APPEARANCE. NOR OBJECTION FILED. CASE DISMISSED AS TO ENTIRE ACTION BY COURT AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING OCT-19-2009 AT 1:30PM. THE COURT FINDS NO GOOD CAUSE OR SUBSTANTIAL JUSTIFICATION FOR FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH THE PREVIOUS COURT ORDERS. A LESS SEVERE SANCTION WOULD NOT BE EFFECTIVE DUE TO THE HISTORY OF LACK OF COMPLIANCE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Oct-19-2009 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. The court having reviewed the file finds no good cause or substantial justification for plaintiff's failure to comply with the court's orders and rules. Therefore, it is hereby ordered that this matter be dismissed. The court finds that a less severe sanction would not be effective due to the history of lack of compliance. Proceedings not reported. (212)
